SQLLite.SQL: SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') AS "AeEventExists" FROM AE_EVENTS AE WHERE AE.AE_NUMBER = ${param.aeNumber} AND AE.STD_EVENT_ID = ${param.eventId} AND TRUNC(AE.EVENT_DATE) = TO_DATE( ${param.eventDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND (AE.ERROR_INDICATOR IS NULL OR AE.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N')

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
